lowering_notes: This stream entity is part of the editable execution graph contract.
Its optimized Vulkan implementation is a backend lowering, not a host-side exception.

modules.responsibility: Normalize the layer input for the token mixer
Project the mixed representation back to the layer width
Merge the token-mixer update with the incoming frame
Produce query, key, value, and optional gate channels
Own, append, and read the stream-specific attention memory
Normalize the token-mixer residual for feature transformation
Merge the feature-transform update with the token-mixer residual
Project into and out of the dense gated feature space
Activate and combine the dense feature branches

notes: This circuit preserves the source grouped-query attention layer decomposition.
KV is represented as stream-owned append-only transient state, not as a disposable host cache.

lowering_notes: Layer is represented as one component-level circuit with explicit internal nodes.
Transient memory belongs to the stream instance.
The graph is ordered topologically so a backend can fuse or replace regions without changing the boundary contract.
